description.zh: 老鼠小镇大停电！接电池、开关、灯泡组成回路，看电流粒子在导线里奔跑。串联一户烧全街黑，改成并联各亮各的；勺子能当导线吗？橡皮鸭呢？全靠你试！
description.en: Blackout in Mouse Town! Wire batteries, switches and bulbs into circuits and watch current particles race through the wires. Series makes the whole street go dark together — rewire in parallel! Can a spoon be a wire? A rubber duck? Try it!
